subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! God willing, mayest thou, through divine bounty, be victorious and attain unto that which is acceptable in His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله انشاء الله بعنایت الهی فائز باشی و بانچه لدی الوجه مقبول است
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @power of prayer, @call to action
